traces.mapping_rationale: Direct bank match for removing the identifier column from both train and test tables.
Direct bank match for converting the raw Open Date string into datetime values with month/day/year format.
Direct bank match for the fixed-anchor OpenDays feature branch described in the task-local notes.
Direct bank match for compact label encoding of City Group and Type.
Chosen as the closest bank action to the notebook's compact Istanbul-versus-other city indicator.
Direct bank match for applying StandardScaler to the P1-P37 numeric feature block.
Direct bank match for log1p normalization of the revenue target before model fitting.
Direct bank match for removing Open Date after the OpenDays feature has already been derived.

omitted_notebook_steps.note: Final model-column selection is kept as a notebook convenience step and is not mapped to a standalone bank action.
The bank also contains a year/month/day date-part alternative, but this baseline intentionally selects only the OpenDays branch from that equivalence group.
